ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Champion of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game took place in */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., Regular Season, Postseason) */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the game was played in */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic took place in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "snaps_played" INTEGER /* Number of snaps played by the player */,
  "snaps_per_game" REAL /* Number of snaps played per game by the player */,
  "snaps_played_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of snaps played by the player */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rush yards by the player */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rush touchdowns by the player */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets for the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy point statistic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic the fantasy points belong to */,
  "fantasy_points_ppr" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player in PPR scoring */,
  "fantasy_point_snap_percentage_ppr" REAL /* Percentage of fantasy points earned per snap by the player in PPR scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_player_stats" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "snaps_played" INTEGER /* Number of snaps played by the player */,
  "snaps_per_game" REAL /* Number of snaps played per game by the player */,
  "snaps_played_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of snaps played by the player */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rush yards by the player */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rush touchdowns by the player */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets for the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_player_stats" (
  "fantasy_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy player statistic */,
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season statistic */,
  "fantasy_points_ppr" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player in PPR scoring */,
  "fantasy_point_snap_percentage_ppr" REAL /* Percentage of fantasy points earned per snap by the player in PPR scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_player_stats_season_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_stat_id") REFERENCES season_player_stats ("season_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_player_ranks" (
  "season_rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season ranking */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_ranks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_ranks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_player_position_ranks" (
  "season_position_rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season position ranking */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player by position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_position_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_position_ranks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_position_ranks_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_player_position_ranks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "snaps_played" INTEGER /* Number of snaps played by the player */,
  "snaps_per_game" REAL /* Number of snaps played per game by the player */,
  "snaps_played_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of snaps played by the player */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rush yards by the player */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rush touchdowns by the player */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets for the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_fantasy_player_stats" (
  "game_fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game fantasy player statistic */,
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game statistic */,
  "fantasy_points_ppr" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player in PPR scoring */,
  "fantasy_point_snap_percentage_ppr" REAL /* Percentage of fantasy points earned per snap by the player in PPR scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_fantasy_player_stats_game_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_stat_id") REFERENCES game_player_stats ("game_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst, User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_watched" (
  "game_watched_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the game was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_watched_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_watched_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_watched_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_watched" (
  "player_watched_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the player was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_watched_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_watched_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_watched_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
